method.description: Binding method. rp_action_hash means the RP computed action_hash over the concrete request using action_profile.

action_hash.description: base64url-encoded hash of canonical action instance computed by the RP.

action_profile.description: Action canonicalization profile used by the RP. SHOULD match action_profile in requirements template.

challenge_id.description: RP-generated challenge identifier to correlate the denial and subsequent authorized retry.

nonce.description: Fresh nonce used to bind the challenge to a short time window.
